items.title: Iran War Live Updates: Rubio Tries to Shift War’s Focus to Strait
items.summary: The secretary of state argued that the U.S. military’s combat operations in Iran ended, and that forces protecting ships in the Strait of Hormuz are on an entirely new mission.
